- AdvancedSelect: searchable, multi-select dropdowns with Preline HSSelect
- ComboBox: type-ahead autocomplete search input

- InputNumber: numeric stepper with +/- buttons
- Datepicker: calendar picker powered by HSDatepicker

* feat: add Phase 2 Data Presentation components

- Chart: interactive charts (bar, line, area, pie, donut) via ApexCharts
- Datatable: sortable, searchable data tables
- TreeView: hierarchical tree view with expand/collapse

* feat: add Phase 3 Content & Upload components

- Editor: WYSIWYG rich text editor
- FileUpload: drag-and-drop file upload with preview
- FileUploadProgress: upload progress indicator

* feat: add Phase 4 UX Polish components

- AvatarGroup: stacked avatar display
- ButtonGroup: grouped action buttons
- InputGroup: input with prefix/suffix addons
- RangeSlider: range input with value display
- LegendIndicator: color-coded status indicators
- ContextMenu: right-click context menus
- StrongPassword: password strength meter
- DragDrop: sortable drag-and-drop lists via SortableJS

* feat: register 19 Preline UI components in PlatformServiceProvider

Register all Phase 1-4 component classes and update view aliases
for AdvancedSelect, ComboBox, SearchBox, InputNumber, Datepicker,
Chart, Datatable, TreeView, Editor, FileUpload, FileUploadProgress,
AvatarGroup, ButtonGroup, InputGroup, RangeSlider, LegendIndicator,
ContextMenu, StrongPassword, and DragDrop.

* feat: add datepicker.js and select.js to Preline script loading

Load separate Preline plugin bundles for HSDatepicker and HSSelect
which are not included in the main index.js bundle.

* feat: update showcase page with Phase 1-4 component sections

Include all four phase showcase partials for complete Preline UI
component demonstration page.

* Apply suggestions from code review

commit.message:
Conditionally include islands.js only on pages with islands

Add hasIslands() to RenderContext so the IslandsScript component in
base.tsx can check whether any islands were registered during render.
Since renderToStaticMarkup serializes depth-first, <main>{children}
</main> is fully serialized before the script tags, so the island
count is accurate by the time IslandsScript runs.

This avoids loading the 1.9 MB islands.js bundle (React + ReactDOM)
on the 9 pages that have no islands.

commit.message:
fix(ha-addon): AppArmor enforce mode — rix for scripts, signal rules

Key fixes:
- ix → rix for /init, /s6-init, /bin/**, /usr/bin/**, /package/**,
  /command/** — shell scripts need read for shebang parsing
- Added signal (send) rule for S6 process management
- Added /dev/tty rw, /run/{,**} rwk, /etc/cont-finish.d/**
- /app/** rixm — allow memory-mapped Python .pyc files
- /tmp/** rwk — lock files need k (lock)
- Removed complain flag — profile is now in enforce mode
- Simplified /s6-init: removed runtime chmod (set at build time)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Docker overlayfs can strip execute permissions from /init on
container restart. The /s6-init wrapper re-applies chmod +x
before exec-ing /init.
